title: Launch & Operations
objective: 在 S05 发布就绪基础上建立可控发布、内容运营与轻量反馈闭环，让 Personal Knowledge Asset OS 可以长期维护而不引入外部副作用失控风险

tasks.title: Create release checklist and rollback plan
acceptance_criteria: Checklist records build, verify, preview and manual review commands
Rollback plan identifies repository, hosting and asset rollback steps
External deploy remains gated by explicit Sense L4 approval
tasks.notes: This task prepares launch; it must not perform deployment.

tasks.title: Define publication channel policy
acceptance_criteria: Allowed and prohibited publication channels are documented
Each external write path declares approval and rollback requirements
tasks.notes: No external account mutation is allowed without human approval.

tasks.title: Create content cadence and editorial queue
acceptance_criteria: Editorial queue separates draft, review and publishable content
Cadence document defines weekly or monthly maintenance rhythm

tasks.title: Add content quality checklist
acceptance_criteria: Checklist covers metadata, links, graph visibility and public readiness
Checklist distinguishes private notes from publishable assets
Checklist can be used before search/feed inclusion
tasks.notes: This is a human-friendly review checklist, not a publishing automation.

tasks.title: Design feedback intake model
acceptance_criteria: Feedback intake options are compared without adding external services by default
Privacy and moderation risks are documented
Recommended default is local or repository-based unless explicitly approved
tasks.notes: Avoid analytics, forms or hosted comments unless later approved.

tasks.title: Create maintenance runbook
acceptance_criteria: Runbook lists known environment blockers such as missing Typst CLI
Runbook defines when to update dependencies, content and generated assets
tasks.notes: Keep maintenance repeatable before adding automation.
